extraction_contract: Use the PDF/AIP section as the source of truth for expected values.
Extract field-value pairs exactly at the documentary field level shown by the AIP.
Do not split a documented field into semantic subfields such as meters/feet, Spanish/English variants, coordinates, phones or temperatures unless the source presents them as separate fields.
Use tables[] only when the source presents repeated rows/columns; table columns must be the documentary column headings.
Preserve NIL, No, blank/null cells and bilingual values as the cell or field value.

tables.name: table_1
tables.label: RADIOAYUDAS PARA LA NAVEGACION Y EL ATERRIZAJE / NAVIGATIONAL AND LANDING AIDS
columns: Tipo de ayuda, MAG VAR, Tipo de operacion apoyada para ILS/GNSS, CAT ILS, declinacion para VOR/ILS / Type of aid, MAG VAR, Type of supported operation for ILS/GNSS, ILS CAT, declination for VOR/ILS
Frecuencia y Canal / Frequency and channel
Horas de operacion / Hours of operation
COORD GEO del emplazamiento de la antena transmisora / Position of transmitting antenna coordinates
Elevacion de la antena transmisora del DME / Elevation of DME transmitting antenna

expected_rows.Observaciones / Remarks (*): DME CH 116X (330 km). Restricciones: Ver ENR 4.1. / Restrictions: See ENR 4.1.
